prose:
I could not obtain a Fukui-reactivity result for nitrobenzene: the chemkit `fukui-reactivity` engine run failed before returning a result JSON or any headline number.

Method requested/attempted: Fukui-reactivity calculation using DFT tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, on the user-supplied fixed geometry `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz`.

chemkit error returned verbatim: `engine run failed (rc=255):`

Warnings: no `warnings` array was returned because the engine failed before producing a result JSON.

Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: unavailable (`null`), because no result JSON was returned.

No computed number is reported here; I will not guess or fabricate the Fukui-reactivity value.
